mapper.sql: wql.id, wql.bean_name, wql.cron_expression, wql.exception_detail, wql.is_success, wql.job_name, wql.method_name, wql.params, wql.time, wql.create_time

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.bean_name as ${tAlias}_bean_name, ${tAlias}.cron_expression as ${tAlias}_cron_expression, ${tAlias}.exception_detail as ${tAlias}_exception_detail, ${tAlias}.is_success as ${tAlias}_is_success, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.method_name as ${tAlias}_method_name, ${tAlias}.params as ${tAlias}_params, ${tAlias}.time as ${tAlias}_time, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time
mapper.insert: insert into wta_quartz_log (bean_name, cron_expression, exception_detail, is_success, job_name, method_name, params, time, create_time) values (#{beanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cronExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{success,jdbcType=BIT}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{time,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update: update wta_quartz_log set bean_name = #{beanName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cron_expression = #{cronExpression,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, exception_detail = #{exceptionDetail,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, is_success = #{success,jdbcType=BIT}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, method_name = #{methodName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, params = #{params,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, time = #{time,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
